name: Honey and Lemon Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Roll out dough and use to line an 8 1/2 inch loose-bottomed flan tin, reserving any trimmings.
3. Remove bottom from the tin.
4. Bake blind for 10 minutes, then remove from the oven and reduce temperature to 350°F.
5. Separate the eggs.
6. In a bowl, combine the yolks with the cheese, honey, and grated rind of one lemon.
7. Squeeze the juice from both lemons and add it to the bowl along with the sultanas.
8. Mix well.
9. In another bowl, whisk the egg whites until they form soft peaks and fold into the cheese mixture using a metal spoon.
10. Pour the batter into the flan case and smooth the surface.
11. Roll out dough trimmings and cut into thin strips with a pastry wheel.
12. Arrange the strips in a lattice pattern over the filling.
13. Bake for 50-55 minutes until set.
14. Cool in the tin, then turn out and serve cold.
